answer:
Abby breaks up with Colin because she realizes he only loves the woman she has been pretending to be, not her true self. After following Mike's advice to attract Colin, she sees that their relationship is based on a false persona. This realization leads her to end the relationship.  

\boxed{\text{Abby breaks up with Colin because she realizes he only loves the woman she has been pretending to be, not her true self.}}
